segments.description: High-intensity cinematic trailer music featuring dramatic orchestral swells, electronic pulses, and percussive hits, layered with intense dialogue and sound effects.
High-intensity, action-oriented trailer music with driving percussion, electronic synth pulses, and dramatic orchestral swells.
Intense, high-energy rock music with aggressive vocals and dramatic sound effects.
High-intensity cinematic trailer music with dramatic orchestral stabs, heavy percussion, and sound effects.
High-energy, cinematic action trailer music with intense sound effects and a promotional voiceover.

summary: The trailer maintains high intensity, combining dramatic, action-oriented cinematic music with promotional voiceover and sound effects.

candidates.title: Master of Puppets
evidence: The aggressive metal cue includes a distinctive repeated "master" hook in the music lane.
The later sung refrain strongly aligns with the same well-known song.
candidates.ambiguity: Trailer dialogue and SFX overlap partially mask the cue in some windows.

recognizedSong.primaryEvidence: The music lane contains a distinctive metal hook that plausibly matches one famous song, reinforced by later vocal evidence.
recognizedSong.ambiguity: Recognition is strong but still partially masked by trailer editing.

recognitionNotes: Instrumental and arrangement cues support the match, but the vocal lane remains the stronger source of literal lyric evidence.
Spoken dialogue over score must not be treated as lyric evidence for song recognition.
